title: No dedicated statistical-analysis capability (avg goals/match, home vs away, biggest wins)
evidence: No tool for category-5 stats; only per-team aggregates exist in src/tools/teams.ts (getTeamStats) and src/tools/standings.ts. how_to_verify's minimal bar ('at least one aggregate statistic') is met, but the spec's named stats are absent.
suggestion: Add a get_statistics tool computing avg goals/match, home-vs-away win rates, and biggest wins over the dataset.

title: ATDD prescribed unit TDD underneath the acceptance suite, but no unit tests exist
evidence: Only src/__tests__/acceptance.test.ts (10 black-box MCP tests); no unit tests for normalizer.ts/loader.ts internals. ATDD prompt: 'using finer-grained unit TDD underneath to build the internals'.
suggestion: Add unit tests for normalizeTeamName/teamsMatch and the per-tool filtering logic.

title: Match filtering supports season but not date-range
evidence: src/tools/matches.ts:11 FindMatchesArgs exposes only season; no from/to date params. R4 says 'date range and/or season', so season satisfies the bar.
suggestion: Add optional dateFrom/dateTo params using normalized date parsing.

title: br_football season derived via new Date(m.date).getFullYear() is fragile
evidence: src/tools/matches.ts:59 — varied date formats (DD/MM/YYYY, with time) may parse to NaN/wrong year.
suggestion: Reuse a shared date normalizer instead of raw new Date().

title: Supplementary brazilian_clubs_players.csv merged with FIFA data
evidence: src/tools/players.ts:18-26 dedupes FIFA + Brazilian-club players by ID, broadening player coverage beyond the spec's fifa_data.csv.
